title: acmella grandiflora var. brachyglossa
intro: Acmella grandiflora var. brachyglossa, also known as toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that belongs to the genus Acmella. The plant is known for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are often utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, such as toothaches and other minor pains. The health benefits of Acmella grandiflora var. brachyglossa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat mouth sores, gum inflammation, and other oral health issues.
